title: CrystalCore - Totem
description: A clean, dark totem from the CrystalCore Pack perfect for Crystal PvP.
body:
**CrystalCore - Totem**

Step into the shadows of PvP with CrystalCore's signature totem.
This custom Totem of Undying features a sleek, deep purple design with glowing cyan eyes crafted for players who want both power and style in their Crystal PvP setup.

- Clean, minimal look
- Dark void aesthetic with vibrant accents
- Perfect for popping with flair

Preview:
